issue.title: [monitoring]: reconcile runner-conflict blocking autonomous loop
bodyLines: The unattended compare monitoring loop detected a persistent `runner-conflict` host state while the standing queue is otherwise empty.

The loop is already alive in autonomous monitoring mode. This issue exists because the loop must seed self-healing work when policy-approved wake conditions appear instead of waiting for operator prompting.
- make the autonomous loop self-heal or route around runner-conflict deterministically
- preserve a machine-readable receipt explaining why the loop injected work
- keep queue-empty safe-idle intact when the conflict no longer applies
